name: OpenWolf
hook: Middleware that cuts Claude Code token usage ~65% via automatic project memory, token tracking, and invisible hooks — zero workflow changes.

name: NVIDIA Lyra 2.0
hook: Turns a single still image into a persistent, explorable 3D world (Gaussian splats + meshes) via a camera-controlled video walkthrough — Apache 2.0.

name: HyperFrames
hook: Open-source video framework that renders HTML compositions into MP4s — ships as a Claude Code skill, Cursor plugin, and MCP server for AI-driven website animations.

name: VoxCPM
hook: Tokenizer-free 48 kHz TTS via end-to-end diffusion-autoregressive architecture — 30 languages, voice design from text prompts, controllable cloning.

name: Open Higgsfield AI
hook: Self-hosted, subscription-free alternative to Higgsfield — cinema-studio UI with 20+ image models (Flux, SDXL, Ideogram) and pro camera controls.
install: git clone https://github.com/sunnychase/open-higgsfield-ai && cd open-higgsfield-ai && npm install && npm run dev

name: claude-code-local
hook: Runs Claude Code fully offline on Apple Silicon via an MLX inference server that speaks the Anthropic API — Gemma, Llama, or Qwen back the full toolset.
install: git clone https://github.com/nicedreamzapp/claude-code-local && cd claude-code-local && bash setup.sh

name: OpenPencil
hook: MIT-licensed Figma alternative with native .fig support, 100+ AI design tools, real-time P2P collab, and an MCP server + skill bundle for Claude Code and Cursor.

name: free-claude-code
hook: Lightweight proxy that reroutes Claude Code's Anthropic API calls to NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, LM Studio, or llama.cpp — no Anthropic key required.

name: Taste Skill
hook: Anti-slop frontend skill that injects opinionated design rules into Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex — kills the default Inter + purple-gradient + grid-card look with 7 variants and 3 parameter dials.

name: Impeccable
hook: Upgrade to Anthropic's frontend-design skill — 23 commands (polish, audit, critique, typeset…) plus a 24-pattern detector that catches AI-slop tells like purple gradients, bounce easing, and dark glows.

name: Emil Kowalski Design Engineer Skill
hook: Linear's Emil Kowalski distilled his essays on UI polish, animation timing, and the invisible details that make interfaces feel right into a drop-in skill for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.

name: Anthropic Courses
hook: Anthropic's free Skilljar training portal — hands-on courses including Claude Code in Action, Introduction to Agent Skills, and prompt-engineering fundamentals.

name: Archon
hook: Open-source harness builder that wraps Claude Code with isolated worktrees, planning, test-iteration loops, and an idea→PR workflow — plus a web dashboard for chat + run monitoring.

name: Anthropic Theme Factory
hook: Official Anthropic skill: a library of curated font + color themes (10 presets like "Ocean Depths") that snap onto slides, artifacts, and any rendered output.

name: Anthropic Brand Guidelines
hook: Official Anthropic skill that enforces the company's visual identity — Anthropic Orange/Blue accents, Poppins + Lora typography, dark/light hex palettes — across any artifact.

name: Obsidian Skills (kepano)
hook: Steph Ango's (Obsidian CEO) official agent-skill bundle — teaches Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and the Obsidian CLI inside any vault.

name: Remotion
hook: Make videos programmatically in React — components, CSS, Canvas, SVG, and WebGL compose into deterministic MP4s. ~44k stars and the de-facto stack for AI-generated motion.

name: MiniMax M2.7
hook: Open-source 230B-param MoE (10B active) tuned for coding + agentic tool use — ~8% the price of Sonnet at 2× speed, with M2.7 ranking #1 among open-source models on Artificial Analysis.

name: Modly
hook: Desktop app that turns any photo into a 3D mesh entirely on your local GPU — pluggable open-source models, MIT-licensed, Windows + Linux (macOS soon).

name: Varlock
hook: AI-safe .env files: a schema DSL gives agents full config context (names, types, validation) without leaking values, plus a pre-commit hook + scan to catch secrets in AI-generated code.

name: OpenScreen
hook: MIT-licensed Screen Studio alternative — auto/manual zoom, motion blur, custom backgrounds in an Electron + React + TS desktop app. +15k stars in a week, ~26k total.

name: MiroFish
hook: Swarm-intelligence prediction engine: spins up thousands of AI agents with personalities + memory in a GraphRAG-built parallel world to forecast outcomes. #1 GitHub trending and $4.1M raised in 24 hours.

name: 3dsvg
hook: Free in-browser editor that turns any SVG into an interactive 3D object — 10 materials, 7 animations, exports as 4K PNG, 60fps MP4/WebM, GLB/STL/OBJ, or copy-paste JSX (Three.js + R3F).

name: Cobalt
hook: Paste-link-get-file media downloader for YouTube, TikTok, X, and dozens more — no ads, no trackers, no caching. Self-hostable Svelte UI + API backend, AGPL.

name: Ruflo
hook: Multi-agent orchestration on top of Claude Code (formerly Claude Flow) — neural routing engine SONA, HNSW vector memory, 87 native MCP tools, 9 RL algos. ~31k stars.

name: jcode
hook: Terminal coding-agent harness with semantic memory, swarm coordination, and browser control — multi-provider (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Copilot), MIT, ~940 stars.

name: Perplexity (ppl-ai)
hook: Perplexity's official GitHub org — pplx-garden (open inference stack), uvloop, python-sdk, news-pulse, and more. Watching for the inference primitives the Perplexity team open-sources.

name: Glif MCP Server
hook: MCP server that exposes any glif.app workflow — image generators, memes, selfies, multimedia AI — to Claude Code and other LLM clients with a single config.

name: Open CoDesign
hook: Open-source, BYOK, local-first Claude Design alternative — 12 design skills (decks, dashboards, landing pages, charts…), sandboxed preview, exports to HTML/PDF/PPTX. Multi-model: Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama.

name: ClassBuild
hook: Topic → full course generator: interactive HTML chapters, gamified quizzes, PPTX with speaker notes, AI-narrated audiobooks, and infographics, all grounded in five learning-science principles.
install: git clone https://github.com/jtangen/classbuild && cd classbuild && npm install && npm run dev

name: agent-browser
hook: Vercel Labs' Rust browser-automation CLI for AI agents — persistent daemon, ref-based DOM interaction (@e1, @e2), works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, and more.

name: Agency Agents
hook: 112 specialized AI agent personas (frontend wizards, Reddit ninjas, whimsy injectors, reality checkers…) drop straight into Claude Code's agents directory — native .md + YAML, conversion scripts for Cursor and Aider.

name: Higgsfield (Cinema Studio + MCP)
hook: AI cinema platform aggregating Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Kling 3.0, Seedance 2.0 (15+ models) under one sub — Cinema Studio 3.5 with real optical physics + camera-motion templates, plus an MCP server that pipes image/video gen into Claude Code.

name: OpenJarvis
hook: Local-first personal-agent framework — shared primitives for on-device agents that treat energy and latency as first-class constraints and only reach for the cloud when they have to. Apache 2.0, ~3.5k stars.
install: git clone https://github.com/open-jarvis/OpenJarvis && cd OpenJarvis && uv sync

name: CoPaw (now QwenPaw)
hook: Personal AI workstation built on AgentScope — multi-agent collaboration, evolving memory, and BYO-model deployment (cloud APIs, Ollama, Apple Silicon). Rebranded from CoPaw to QwenPaw in April 2026.

name: Fincept Terminal
hook: Open-source Bloomberg Terminal alternative — native C++20 + Qt6 + embedded Python, 37 AI agents (Buffett, Graham, Lynch, Munger…), 100+ data connectors, multi-provider LLM (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, MiniMax, Ollama). AGPL-3.0.

name: awesome-openclaw-usecases
hook: Community-curated list of practical OpenClaw use cases — semantic vault search, arXiv-paper conversations, voice/SMS access from any phone, family-calendar briefings, multi-agent Telegram teams, meeting-to-Jira pipelines.

name: arcads-claude-code
hook: Arcads API wrapped as a Claude Code skill — generates AI influencers (hero + 9 angles) and UGC selfie-frame ads from character + product + style refs, with a MASTER_CONTEXT.md workspace memory.

name: AI Engineering Hub
hook: 93+ production-ready tutorials covering LLMs, RAG, and real-world AI agent applications — by Akshay Pachaar (Daily Dose of Data Science), the go-to reference repo for AI engineers.

name: TradingAgents
hook: Multi-agent LLM framework that simulates a real trading firm — fundamentals, sentiment, news, and technicals analysts collaborate on trade decisions. Apache 2.0, ~66k stars.
install: git clone https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents && cd TradingAgents && pip install .

name: Dive into Claude Code
hook: Source-level architectural teardown of Claude Code (~1,900 TS files, ~512K LOC) — 7 safety layers, 5 compaction stages, design framework tracing 5 human values → 13 principles. Headline: "98.4% Infrastructure, 1.6% AI."

name: OpenHands
hook: Open-source AI software-engineering platform — Python SDK, CLI, local GUI, and cloud runtime for autonomous coding agents. MIT, ~72k stars.

name: Dify
hook: Visual LLM-app platform combining workflow orchestration, RAG pipelines, agent tools, prompt management, and observability — Docker-deployable, ~140k stars.
install: cd dify/docker && cp .env.example .env && docker compose up -d

name: Hermes Agent
hook: Nous Research's open-source self-improving personal agent — single gateway to Telegram/Discord/Slack/WhatsApp/Signal/CLI, BYO-model (Nous Portal, OpenRouter, NIM), and a Skills Hub that's compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex. ~23k stars.

name: Pi (pi coding agent)
hook: Minimal, opinionated terminal coding agent — 4 tools (read, edit, write, bash), <1k-token system prompt, no MCP, no permission gates, fully replaceable prompt. The intentional anti-Claude-Code.
